ksa_text: Ability to define, operationalize, and embed trustworthy AI principles—including validity, reliability, safety, security, resilience, accountability, and transparency—into AI system design and organizational governance processes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and Implement cybersecurity independent audit processes for application software/networks/systems and oversee ongoing independent audits to ensure that operational and Research and Design (R&D) processes and procedures are in compliance with organizational and mandatory cybersecurity requirements and accurately followed by Systems Administrators and other cybersecurity staff when performing their day-to-day activities.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of risk mitigation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Knowledge of risk mitigation principles and practices

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-A-003 (AI Governance/Ability) scores 0.491 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.491) and is edge_case for the AI Research Scientist role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.491), and AI Governance handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: AI Governance for AI Research Scientist IC-principal?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI research scientists increasingly engage with alignment/safety topics (AI Governance adjacent). Technical AI safety, alignment research, and model cards may be in scope at principal level. Governance ownership and policy authorship remain out of scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI research scientists increasingly engage with alignment/safety topics (AI Governance adjacent). Final decision: include.
